---
title: "keren"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.explore)
library(spicyR)
library(TreeBH)
library(DART)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(furrr)
source("R/global_keren.R")
source("R/simulation_helpers.R")
source("R/benchmarking_helpers.R")
source("R/pfilter.R")
```

```{r}
kerenSPE <- SpatialDatasets::spe_Keren_2018()
```

```{r}
# Remove unidentified cells and subset to two conditions
kerenSub = kerenSPE[, kerenSPE$tumour_type %in% c("cold", "compartmentalised") &
                       kerenSPE$cellType != "Unidentified"]
kerenSub$tumour_type = droplevels(factor(kerenSub$tumour_type))

# Add major and lineage labels to colData
colData(kerenSub)$cellType_major = unname(KEREN_MAJOR_MAP[kerenSub$cellType])
colData(kerenSub)$lineage        = unname(KEREN_LINEAGE_MAP[kerenSub$cellType])

# Run spicy at all three levels
spicySub     = spicy(kerenSub, condition = "tumour_type", cellType = "cellType",
                     subject = "DONOR_NO", imageID = "imageID")
spicyMajor   = spicy(kerenSub, condition = "tumour_type", cellType = "cellType_major",
                     subject = "DONOR_NO", imageID = "imageID")
spicyLineage = spicy(kerenSub, condition = "tumour_type", cellType = "lineage",
                     subject = "DONOR_NO", imageID = "imageID")
```

```{r}
run_all_methods_keren = function(spicy_sub   = spicySub,
                                 spicy_major  = spicyMajor,
                                 spicy_lineage = spicyLineage,
                                 spe          = kerenSub,
                                 conditionB   = "compartmentalised",
                                 subject_col  = "DONOR_NO",
                                 q            = 0.05) {
  
  # Set global maps required by helper functions
  MAJOR_MAP         <<- KEREN_MAJOR_MAP
  MAJOR_LINEAGE_MAP <<- KEREN_MAJOR_LINEAGE_MAP

  # ── Flat BH ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  flatBh = extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
    mutate(method = "Flat BH", reject = bh_reject(pval, q = q))

  # ── Flat BY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  flatBy = extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
    mutate(method = "Flat BY",
           reject = p.adjust(pval, method = "BY") <= q)

  # ── TreeBH ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  treebh = tryCatch(
    run_treebh(spicy_sub, conditionB = conditionB, q = c(q, q)),
    error = function(e) {
      message("TreeBH failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
        mutate(method = "TreeBH", reject = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # ── DART ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dart = tryCatch(
    run_dart_one(spicy_sub, spe, conditionB = conditionB,
                 alpha = q, subject_col = subject_col),
    error = function(e) {
      message("DART failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
        mutate(method = "DART", reject = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # ── p-filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  pfilterRes = tryCatch(
    run_pfilter_one(spicy_sub, spicy_major, conditionB = conditionB,
                    alpha_major = q, alpha_leaf = q),
    error = function(e) {
      message("pfilter failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
        mutate(method = "pfilter", reject = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # ── Ours ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  oursRes = tryCatch({
    out = run_ours_one(spicy_lineage, spicy_major, spicy_sub,
                       conditionB = conditionB, q = q, l1_method = "BY")
    out$res_ours %>%
      filter(level == 3) %>%
      transmute(leaf = node, pval = pvalue, method = "Ours", reject)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Ours failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
    extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
      mutate(method = "Ours", reject = FALSE)
  })

  # ── ClusterTrim ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  clustertrim = tryCatch(
    run_cluster_trim_one(spicy_sub, spicy_major, conditionB = conditionB,
                         q = q, major_method = "BH"),
    error = function(e) {
      message("ClusterTrim_BY failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB) %>%
        mutate(method = "ClusterTrim_BY", reject = FALSE)
    }
  )

  # ── Combine ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  allRaw = list(flatBh, flatBy, treebh, dart, pfilterRes, oursRes, clustertrim) %>%
    purrr::map_dfr(function(df) {
      df %>%
        select(any_of(c("method", "leaf", "pval", "coef", "reject"))) %>%
        mutate(reject = as.logical(reject))
    })

  # ── Summary (no ground truth) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  summary = allRaw %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(n_rejected = sum(reject), n_total = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(n_rejected))

  list(raw = allRaw, summary = summary)
}
```

```{r}
kerenBench = run_all_methods_keren()
kerenBench$summary
kerenBench$raw %>% filter(reject) %>% arrange(method, pval)
```
